name: Ra Rerng Fai
overview: When Chakrit's father is wrongly imprisoned by Yada's family, he vows revenge by humiliating Yada's sister at their wedding. But his plan spirals into a chaotic war of retaliation as Chakrit and Yada clash, dragging both families into a whirlwind of backfired schemes and escalating drama.

trailers.title: ระเริงไฟ | เร็วๆ นี้ | Ch3Thailand
